treatment_information.treatment_response: Transient improvement in dystonia with excess sedation; quickly weaned
Transient reduction in spasticity and dystonia with sedation

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 4 mg per day initially, reduced to 1.5 mg per day after pump implantation
treatment_information.treatment_response: Transient reduction in spasticity and dystonia with sedation
Substantial response with decreased tone and dystonia, improved ambulation, no sedation

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Dose titrated up to 1200 mcg per day over 3 months
treatment_information.treatment_response: Sustained improvement: dystonia scale rating dropped from 3+ to 1+, improved ambulation, enhanced activities of daily living

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Injections in left proximal and distal upper extremity

treatment_timeline.event: Trihexyphenidyl started and discontinued due to sedation
L-dopa/carbidopa trial initiated with no improvement
Oral baclofen and clonazepam added with transient effects
Baclofen dose titrated up to 1200 mcg/day over 3 months
Botulinum toxin type-A injections administered pre- and post-pump

patient_outcome.final_status: Improved ambulation, decreased dystonia, enhanced activities of daily living
